title: 500 Pcs Nuts and Bolts Assorted Set, Black Hex Socket Head Cap Screws Bolts and Nuts Kit, M3/M4/M5 Thread Fastener Machine Hex Bolts and Nuts Assortment Kit with Box
features: 【Premium Material】Our nut and bolts kit is made of outstanding carbon steel with rust-proof plated, great wear-proof, a nice smooth finish, solid and durable for long time use, provides strength and offers good corrosion resistance in many environments.

【Easy to Use】The nuts can expand the contact area and reduce the pressure in order to protect the screws and parts. The hex steel screw threads are uniform, smooth and tight, not easy to deform and slide in the working process, perfectly match with nuts.
【Easy to Carry】All of nuts and bolts are packed in a sturdy divided plastic box, various lengths, completely diversified assortment, organized and easy to open and look for, convenient and portable.

【Wide Applications】Widely used in the home and office appliance, communication equipments, ship assembly and other machinery industry, furniture, car and motorcycle repair and DIY inventions, industrial and construction fasteners, etc.

【What You Will Get】You will get 30pcs m3*8 mm, 30pcs m3*12 mm, 30pcs m3*16 mm, 30pcs m3*20 mm, and 120pcs m3 nuts; 20pcs m4*8 mm, 20pcs m4*12 mm, 20pcs m4*16 mm, 20pcs m4*20 mm, and 80pcs m4 nuts; 15pcs m5*8 mm, 15pcs m5*12 mm, 10pcs m5*16 mm, 10pcs m5*20 mm, and 50pcs m5 nuts, a total of 500pcs, enough for your daily use.
description: Features: - Our hex nut and bolt assortment sets are made of high-quality carbon steel, which is sturdy, and durable for long time use. - The bolts threads are smooth, sharp and accurate, not easy to deform and slide in the working process. - The socket bolt and nut set comes with a plastic organizer box for storage, also suitable for collecting your small accessories. - You will get 500 pcs m3, m4, m5 bolts and nuts, which is enough for your daily use. - Suitable for furniture and ship repair, machine made, vehicle construction site and building, ect. Product Informations: - Product Name: Nuts and Bolts Assorted Set - Material: Carbon Steel - Color: Black - Size: M3/M4/M5 - Quantity: 500 Pcs Pack Includes: M3*8 - 30 Pcs M3*12 - 30 Pcs M3*16 - 30 Pcs M3*20 - 30 Pcs M3 Nuts - 120 Pcs M4*8 - 20 Pcs M4*12 - 20 Pcs M4*16 - 20 Pcs M4*20 - 20 Pcs M4 Nuts - 80 Pcs M5*8 - 15 Pcs M5*12 - 15 Pcs M5*16 - 10 Pcs M5*20 - 10 Pcs M5 Nuts - 50 Pcs Warm Tips: - Please check the size carefully before purchasing, thanks. - Please allow small error due to manual measurement. Thanks for your understanding. - Products contain small parts, keep away from children to prevent mistaken swallowed. - If you have any questions when you use our nuts and bolts, please feel free to contact us, we will definitely provide you with a satisfactory solution.
